The Goods
Est. Cardiff
Our Story
Fresh.
Bold.
Uncompromising.

Phat Boys is Cardiff's boldest container kitchen, serving up quality smash burgers, crispy chicken, loaded fries and fresh mojitos made entirely from scratch — every single order.

We use only 100% Irish Angus Beef and the freshest ingredients we can get our hands on. No shortcuts. No compromise. Just ridiculously good food, made the right way.

Find us at 105 City Road every Thursday through Monday from 5pm. On-site parking available after 7pm.

✓100% Irish Angus Beef
